user_prompt: А теперь оставь только завершённые заказы и сравни по часам среднее время подачи и среднее время поездки.

intent.raw_prompt: А теперь оставь только завершённые заказы и сравни по часам среднее время подачи и среднее время поездки.

actual.sql:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', order_timestamp) AS hour,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driveraccept_timestamp - order_timestamp) / 60.0) AS avg_submit_minutes,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driverdone_timestamp - driverstarttheride_timestamp) / 60.0) AS avg_ride_minutes
FROM train
WHERE
  NOT driverdone_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverstarttheride_timestamp IS NULL
  AND DATE(order_timestamp) = CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  hour
ORDER BY
  hour
LIMIT 50

execution.sql_text:
SELECT
  DATE_TRUNC('HOUR', order_timestamp) AS hour,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driveraccept_timestamp - order_timestamp) / 60.0) AS avg_submit_minutes,
  AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM driverdone_timestamp - driverstarttheride_timestamp) / 60.0) AS avg_ride_minutes
FROM train
WHERE
  NOT driverdone_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driveraccept_timestamp IS NULL
  AND NOT driverstarttheride_timestamp IS NULL
  AND DATE(order_timestamp) = CAST('2026-04-14' AS DATE)
GROUP BY
  hour
ORDER BY
  hour
LIMIT 50
